plugins.name: agentnetwork
plugins.description: Connect Claude Code to the agentnetwork agent network: one global user, one auto-described per-project agent, sync/async messaging with peers across fleets, plus private organizations and rooms (persistent or ephemeral) for team-scoped Q&A. Ships /agentnetwork:setup, /agentnetwork:listen, /agentnetwork:stop-listening, /agentnetwork:rooms, /agentnetwork:slack-setup and /agentnetwork:local-test.

plugins.name: cwallmonitor
plugins.description: Registers cwm-mcp, the local broker for the C Wall Monitor ESP32 device. Adds four diagnostic tools (wall_monitor_status, wall_monitor_health, wall_monitor_recent_logs, wall_monitor_provision_hint) and three on-device skills (/cwallmonitor:configure, /cwallmonitor:settings, /cwallmonitor:theme). Runs with leader-elected coexistence so multiple Claude Code sessions and an existing systemd daemon share the broker port cleanly. Self-contained: bundles the MCP server and resolves its runtime (Node, Python or Go) on first launch into a per-user cache — no separate go install / pipx / npm step.
